channel.title: PostSynaptic
channel.description: build it. break it. ship it anyway. Technical build log by Michael Kent.
channel.author: Michael Kent

item.title: Channel Launch — The Stack Tour
item.description: What I build with, why I picked it, and what this channel is about. A full walkthrough of the production stack behind PostSynaptic — from C#/.NET and Azure to MCP servers and home lab Kubernetes.
